mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, goal_date AS goalDate, goal_type AS goalType, target_count AS targetCount, actual_count AS actualCount, completed, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM biz_goal_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND goal_date = #{goalDate}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(goal_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, MAX(CASE WHEN goal_type = 'daily_learn' THEN actual_count ELSE 0 END) AS learnProgress, MAX(CASE WHEN goal_type = 'daily_learn' THEN target_count ELSE 0 END) AS learnTarget, MAX(CASE WHEN goal_type = 'daily_learn' THEN completed ELSE 0 END) = 1 AS learnCompleted, MAX(CASE WHEN goal_type = 'daily_master' THEN actual_count ELSE 0 END) AS masterProgress, MAX(CASE WHEN goal_type = 'daily_master' THEN target_count ELSE 0 END) AS masterTarget, MAX(CASE WHEN goal_type = 'daily_master' THEN completed ELSE 0 END) = 1 AS masterCompleted FROM biz_goal_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND goal_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY goal_date ORDER BY goal_date ASC
